# CLAUDE.md

Shared Agent Pack provides the shared Claude Code wiring for this repository.

## Source of truth

- Edit shared definitions in `agent-pack/core/`.
- Edit MCP registrations in `agent-pack/mcp/registry.json`.
- Regenerate Claude outputs with `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-agent-pack.ps1`.
- Do not hand-edit generated files in `.claude/` or this file.

## Local commands

- `/build-feature`: Implement a scoped feature in the current repository, validate the result, and summarize the change set.
- `/review-diff`: Review a diff or pending change set for bugs, regressions, risky assumptions, and missing tests.

## Local subagents

- `coder`: Implementation specialist
- `planner`: Scoping and sequencing specialist
- `reviewer`: Risk-focused reviewer

## Local skills

- `repo-conventions`: project-local skill at `.claude/skills/repo-conventions/SKILL.md`

## MCP servers to register

- `github`: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github (env: GITHUB_TOKEN)
- `notion`: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-notion (env: NOTION_TOKEN)

## Working rules

- Use the generated commands in `.claude/commands/` as the user-facing entrypoints.
- Use the generated subagents in `.claude/agents/` for role-specific handoffs.
- Load `repo-conventions` before changing the agent pack itself.
- Read `app/CLAUDE.md` before changing application code under `app/`.
